name: kawaii-vscode-color
description: Dark pink and light green pastel-pink VS Code themes with optional glow effects, image-backed editor styling, color customization, Settings Sync, and JSON import/export.
author: EmmiiChan

scripts.build:local: node ./scripts/increment-package-version.js && npm run compile && npm run build:theme && node ./scripts/package-local-vsix.js
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:dom && npm run test:integration
scripts.type-check: tsc -p tsconfig.extension.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.test:check: npm run test:docs && npm run compile && npm run compile:tests && node --check scripts/build-color-theme.js && node --check scripts/check-codex-docs.js && node --check scripts/check-codex-docs.test.js && node --check scripts/e2e-last-run.js && node --check scripts/e2e-last-run.test.js && node --check scripts/increment-package-version.js && node --check scripts/require-e2e-neon-flag.js && node --check scripts/run-e2e.js && node --check scripts/run-test-all.js && node --check out/src/emptyEditorLogoStyles.js && node --check out/src/extension.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/adapters/NodeFileSystem.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/adapters/VscodeExtensionStorage.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/adapters/VscodeNotificationService.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/controllers/NeonEffectController.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/controllers/SettingsCommandController.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/controllers/SettingsMessageController.js && node --check node --check out/src/extensionHost/services/SettingsStateService.js && node --check out/src/extensionHost/services/WorkbenchPatchService.js && node --check out/src/extensionRoot.js && node --check out/src/randomNekoImage.js && node --check out/src/renderer/ThemeTemplate.js && node --check out/src/settings.js && node --check out/src/settingsBundle.js && node --check out/src/settingsColorService.js && node --check out/src/settingsEffectsPersistence.js && node --check out/src/settingsPersistence.js && node --check out/src/settingsStore.js && node --check out/src/settingsWebview.js && node --check out/src/webview/settings/SettingsClientController.js && node --check out/src/webview/settings/SettingsView.js && node --check out/src/webview/settings/SettingsViewModel.js && node --check out/src/webview/settings/SettingsWebviewHtml.js && node --check out/src/webview/settings/SettingsWebviewStyles.js && node --check out/src/workbenchPatch.js && node --check src/js/theme_template.js && node --check test/dom/settings-webview-split.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/compiled-runtime-entry.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/extension-editor-background-fit.test.js && node --check test/unit/neon-effect-controller.test.js && node --check test/unit/neon-effect-service.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/random-neko-image.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/renderer-theme-template.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/settings-persistence.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/settings-store.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/shared-contracts.test.js && node --check test/unit/settings-message-controller.test.js && node --check out-tests/test/unit/workbench-patch.test.js && node --check test/unit/workbench-patch-service.test.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-apply.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-applied.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-alternate.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-reverted.js && node --check test/e2e/.mocharc.neon-restored.js && node --check test/e2e/helpers/extester-app.js && node --check test/e2e/helpers/png-analysis.js && node --check test/e2e/vscode-launcher.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/settings-webview.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/settings-safe-flows.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/settings-visual-states.spec.js && node --check test/e2e/neon-real.spec.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && npm run compile:tests && node --test "scripts/**/*.test.js" "test/unit/**/*.test.js" "out-tests/test/unit/**/*.test.js"
scripts.test:e2e:current: npm run compile && node scripts/run-e2e.js current
scripts.test:e2e:neon: node scripts/require-e2e-neon-flag.js && npm run compile && node scripts/run-e2e.js neon
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run build:theme
scripts.publish:vsce: npm run compile && npm run build:theme && npx --yes @vscode/vsce publish

kawaii_synthwave.brightness.description: Set the brightness value for the glow effect. 0.0 is fully transparent and 1.0 is fully bright

kawaii_synthwave.disableGlow.description: Disable the glow effect, but show Kawaii VS Code Color editor chrome updates
